nasb.text: who was declared the Son of God with power by the resurrection from the dead, according to the Spirit of holiness, Jesus Christ our Lord,

esv.text: and was declared to be the Son of God in power according to the Spirit of holiness by his resurrection from the dead, Jesus Christ our Lord,

cnv.text: 按聖潔的靈說，因為從死人中復活，顯明他是大有能力的、　神的兒子。

ccb.text: 从圣洁的灵来看，祂从死里复活，用大能显明自己是上帝的儿子。

csbs.text: 照着圣洁的灵说，藉着从死人中复活，他被显明是神大能的儿子。
